Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Highgold]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Highgold is a rank of Gold above Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Highgold is a level of strength or status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Highgold is a status or group within the Five Factions Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Highgold is an impressive stage of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Highgold is a rank or status held by Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Highgold is a power stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — A perfect Iron body guarantees Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Highgold is a rank or title.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Highgold is a stage or rank that Jai Long will no longer be in a year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Highgold is an advancement stage that only one in a thousand Lowgolds reaches.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Jade is a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — A Highgold is a type of opponent or entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Highgold is a stage or destination.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Highgold is a stage above Lowgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin could reach Highgold if she let go of her Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Highgold is a level or state that can be reached by cracking open a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Highgold is a location that Yerin is stuck at the barrier of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Highgold is a boundary that can be broken with enough sword madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Highgold is a rank or stage within the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon killed a Highgold.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Highgold is a rank or classification for Remnant arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Highgold is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Highgold is a rank for applicants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — There is a Highgold sword artist nearby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Highgold is a rank of madra potency.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Highgold is a level of advancement/stage.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — Highgold is a stage or level of power/density.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — The fish give off the same pressure as a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Highgold is a level of fish in the habitat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — A glass of Spirit Well could take a Highgold to the brink of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Highgold is a stage of advancement on the Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Highgold is a group or entity that can operate launcher constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Highgold is a type of dragon.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Highgold is a rank within the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's second core is still Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Hundreds or thousands of Highgolds have broken through to Truegold in the Blackflame Empire camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Highgold is a stage Mercy reached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — A young Highgold man stood next to her, holding a Forged sword of pale light in both hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Highgolds have tents containing only a few other people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Advancing to Highgold is inferior to advancing to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Highgold has purple crystalline armor and the pressure of a peak Truegold.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Highgolds were among the spectators watching from further back.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Highgolds were fighting Bloody Thorn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Highgolds are a type of character who attacked Kelsa.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
